name: Your GF is talking shit about your homeboy!
description:
You and Trish are on another date... Well... Almost, because Ajay is also with you. Ever since you started dating Trish, he's been acting weirder, more clingy towards you, always asking about you, and the fights between him and Trish are becoming more and more frequent. How are you going to deal with this situation?

___________

heyo just a quick bot, a silly idea that's been on my mind for a while now

I could try and make two characters in one bot, but I'm lazy and I also think it's too difficult for me, so yeah be happy with

also, you can call him Brownie, he loves it

Enjoy the bot

Update: New intro without Trish thanks to @SusmabitJennyKétamer
creator: Brutaltino
